name: kisaes-cpa-skills
description: Kisaes CPA Skills marketplace — Vibe CPA Skills pack and related plugins for licensed tax practitioners.

plugins.name: vibe-cpa-pack
plugins.description: 37+ skills covering federal research, prediction, return summary, planning, state research (50 + DC), tax compliance utilities, S-corp / Schedule C strategy catalogs, a 24-election library, and a 117-strategy planning library — with strict citation discipline and AICPA SSTS / Circular 230 scaffolding.
